He’s wearing a black shirt, shorts, and sneakers, and he’s carrying a bag in one hand, which looks like a gym or sports bag. The staircase has wooden railings and metal steps, and it seems pretty spacious. You can also see signs indicating "Levels 02 & 03," suggesting this might be a multi-level facility, possibly an office or library.

Um, in the background, there’s more of the building visible, with large glass windows on the left side. These windows let in a lot of light, making the space look open and airy. There’s carpeted flooring and what appears to be some furniture or desks further back, but they’re not very clear. Overall, it seems like a calm environment, maybe designed for work or study.
